meta_title: The Backrooms: Online | Co-op Multiplayer Horror
meta_desc: Escape the Backrooms with friends! A liminal multiplayer survival horror game developed by Davilkus Games.
og_title: The Backrooms: Online | Co-op Survival Horror
og_desc: Immersive multiplayer exploration of the Backrooms. Can you escape with your friends?
hero_subtitle:
Escape the Backrooms with friends!
The ultimate co-op multiplayer horror.
about_p1: Multiplayer survival horror game developed by a small, but passionate team called Davilkus Games, based on the Backrooms fandom.
about_p2: The game is an immersive exploration of multiple Backrooms levels with friends or via matchmaking. The project aims to create a deeply atmospheric and mechanically rich experience, bringing the unsettling lore of this specific Backrooms level to life.
features_p1: Experience a multitude of levels and diverse gameplay mechanics.
features_p2: Choose from different game modes, host your own custom player servers, and enjoy full mod support for endless community content.
